name: storage
description: Optional S3-compatible publication for uploaded assets while keeping a local mirror.

settings.label: Storage driver
settings.description: Use s3 for an S3-compatible endpoint. Leave the extension disabled to use local-only assets.

settings.label: Endpoint URL
settings.description: S3 or S3-compatible endpoint, such as an internal MinIO URL.

settings.label: Bucket
settings.description: Bucket name used for published assets.

settings.label: Region
settings.description: Signing region used by the S3-compatible service.

settings.label: Access key
settings.description: Credential used only for the S3 upload request.

settings.label: Secret key
settings.description: Leave blank to keep the current secret key.

settings.label: Public base URL
settings.description: Optional public URL prefix for published assets.

settings.label: Object prefix
settings.description: Folder-like prefix placed before asset names.

settings.label: Upload timeout seconds
settings.description: Maximum time permitted for an individual remote asset upload.
